title: SnapCut AI — Full-Stack Background Removal Platform

requirements.text: Design and apply a cohesive visual theme across the entire site inspired by a dark, modern AI-tech aesthetic: deep charcoal/near-black backgrounds (#0D0D0D, #141414), vivid electric green accents (#00FF87 or similar), clean sans-serif typography, subtle glassmorphism cards, and smooth gradient highlights. This palette and style must be consistent on every page.

quotes: on the basis of this logo take the background colour and generate website fully functional

acceptanceCriteria: Global CSS/Tailwind config uses the dark background and electric-green accent throughout
All cards, buttons, and nav elements follow the same theme
No page breaks the established color and typography system

requirements.text: Build a responsive landing page (Home) with: a hero section featuring the SnapCut AI brand name/logo area, a compelling headline ('Remove Backgrounds in One Click'), a short sub-headline, and a prominent CTA button ('Try It Free — Upload Now') that scrolls to the upload tool. Include a 'How It Works' section (3 steps: Upload → AI Removes Background → Download), a Features section highlighting 6 key features (one-click removal, drag-and-drop, multiple formats, transparent PNG output, fast processing, secure handling), a Target Audience section, and a footer with brand name and nav links.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section renders with headline, sub-headline, and CTA button
CTA scrolls to the upload tool section
'How It Works' section shows 3 numbered steps
Features section shows 6 feature cards
Footer renders with nav links and brand name
Page is fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Build a fully functional background removal tool section/page with: a drag-and-drop upload zone that also supports click-to-browse; accepted formats JPG, PNG, WEBP; a file size limit of 10MB; an animated processing state after upload; a side-by-side or toggle before/after preview of the original and result images; a 'Remove Background' action button; and a 'Download PNG' button that triggers download of the result as a transparent PNG. The background removal must be simulated on the frontend using a canvas-based approach (remove white/near-white pixels or apply a chroma-key style effect) since no external AI API is available in this environment.

quotes: Users only need to upload an image and click one button

acceptanceCriteria: Drag-and-drop and click-to-browse both work for image upload
JPG, PNG, and WEBP files are accepted; invalid types show an error
Files over 10MB are rejected with an error message
An animated loader/spinner appears during processing
Before/after preview renders showing original and processed image
Download button triggers download of the result as a PNG file
The section is accessible from the landing page CTA

requirements.text: Build a Pricing page accessible via the navigation bar with three plan tiers: (1) Free — 5 removals/day, standard quality, no credit card required; (2) Pro — $9.99/month, unlimited removals, HD quality, priority processing; (3) Business — $29.99/month, unlimited removals, API access, bulk processing, dedicated support. Each plan card must show the plan name, price, feature list, and a CTA button. Highlight the Pro plan as 'Most Popular'. Include a pay-per-use note: 'Need more? Buy credits — $0.10 per image.'
acceptanceCriteria: Three plan cards render: Free, Pro, Business
Correct pricing and feature lists are displayed for each plan
Pro plan has a 'Most Popular' badge
Pay-per-use note is visible on the pricing page
CTA buttons are present on each card
Page is accessible from the main navigation

requirements.text: Add a persistent top navigation bar with: the SnapCut AI logo/brand mark on the left, navigation links ('Home', 'Tool', 'Pricing', 'FAQ'), and a 'Get Started' CTA button on the right. The navbar must be sticky (fixed on scroll) and collapse into a hamburger menu on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is visible and sticky on all pages
All nav links navigate to the correct sections/pages
'Get Started' button links to the upload tool
On mobile, nav collapses into a hamburger menu that opens/closes a drawer

requirements.text: Add a basic FAQ section/page with at least 6 common questions and answers covering: what formats are supported, how long processing takes, whether images are stored, what the free plan includes, how to upgrade, and data privacy/deletion policy.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 FAQ items are displayed
Each item is an expandable accordion with question and answer
FAQ is accessible from the navigation

requirements.text: Store a simple usage counter in the Motoko backend actor to track total background removal operations processed by the platform (anonymous aggregate count only — no user data). Expose a query method `getTotalProcessed() : async Nat` and an update method `recordProcessed() : async ()`. Display the live count on the landing page hero section as a social proof stat (e.g., 'X images processed').
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor has `getTotalProcessed` and `recordProcessed` methods
Calling `recordProcessed` increments the counter
Frontend reads the counter via React Query and displays it on the hero section
Counter updates after each removal operation on the tool page

requirements.text: Generate and render the following static image assets: a SnapCut AI hero background (abstract dark tech texture with subtle green light streaks), a brand logo mark (stylized scissors with a green AI spark), and three illustrative icons for the 'How It Works' steps (upload icon, AI processing icon, download icon). Serve all images from `frontend/public/assets/generated`.

quotes: on the basis of this logo take the background colour and generate website fully functional

acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image renders in the hero section
Logo mark renders in the navbar and hero
Three step icons render in the 'How It Works' section
All images load from /assets/generated path

constraints: No external AI APIs (OpenAI, remove.bg, etc.) may be called — background removal must be implemented client-side using canvas
No external storage (Cloudinary, S3) — images are processed in-browser and never sent to a server
No real payment processing — pricing page is UI-only
Do not edit any file listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
nonGoals: Real AI/ML background removal via third-party API
Cloudinary or any external file storage

required: Abstract dark tech hero background with subtle electric-green glowing light streaks on near-black (#0D0D0D) surface, cinematic, high-tech feel (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

SnapCut AI brand logo mark: stylized sharp scissors silhouette in white with a glowing electric-green AI spark/lightning bolt accent, minimal flat design on transparent background (logo-mark.dim_256x256.png)
Illustrated upload step icon: upward arrow entering a cloud outline, white line-art on dark background with green accent (step-upload.dim_128x128.png)
Illustrated AI processing step icon: abstract brain or chip with circuit lines and green pulse, white line-art on dark background (step-ai.dim_128x128.png)
Illustrated download step icon: downward arrow exiting a frame with transparent checkerboard corners, white line-art on dark background with green accent (step-download.dim_128x128.png)
